rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Powershell Base64 Encoding (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Powershell Base64 Encoding (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 4becc177-8fc7-40b4-aa12-ee55202bbe95
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of powershell.exe with base64 Option. Part of the
  RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/powershell/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \powershell.exe
    CommandLine|contains: base64
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
